revision.comment: Bot: migrate talk page structure; import discussion seed (en:Gunma Prefectural Museum of History); add local discussion section + dated import note

[[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Gunma_Prefectural_Museum_of_History here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
